title: Manage IPs
listingTabIpDescription: My public IP addresses and associated services
listingColumnsIpAntiDDosPermanentTooltip: The Anti-DDoS Scrubbing Center is permanently enabled for this IP. To be used with caution
listingColumnsIpAntiDDosAutomaticTooltip: The anti-DDoS infrastructure automatically protects this IP in case of attack detection.
listingColumnsIpAntiDDosInActionTooltip: Suspicious traffic has been detected. The anti-DDoS scrubbing centers are actively mitigating this attack.
listingColumnsIpAntiDDosPendingTooltip: The reconfiguration of the Anti-DDoS is in progress and will be applied in a few moments.
listingColumnsIpEdgeFirewallEnabledToolt: Network Edge Firewall is currently protecting this IP by filtering incoming traffic. Click to configure.
listingColumnsIpEdgeFirewallDisabledTool: Traffic does not pass through Network Edge Firewall unless an attack is detected. In the event of an attack, it will be automatically activated. Click to configure.
listingColumnsIpEdgeFirewallPendingToolt: The reconfiguration of the Network Edge Firewall is in progress and will be applied in a few moments. Click to configure.
listingColumnsIpGameFirewallAvailableToo: The Game Firewall is available but is not configured at the moment. To enable protection, configure your game rules. Click to configure.
listingColumnsIpGameFirewallPendingToolt: The reconfiguration of the Game Firewall is in progress and will be applied in a few moments. Click to configure.
listingQuickFilterShowParkedIps: Show IP addresses on the Parking (unused) only
listingTerminateByoip_info1: This IP block is part of a larger BYOIP block. Please go to <Link>my services</Link> and choose "terminate" if you wish to cancel your BYOIP service.
listingTerminateByoip_info2: This IP block is part of a larger BYOIP block. Please use the API <Link>(link)</Link> if you wish to cancel your BYOIP service.
listingActionManageSubnetInVrack: Manage IPv6 subnets in the vRack
listingActionUpdateIpBlockInformation: View / Edit information about the IP block
listingUpsertDescriptionSuccessMessage: The description of IP {{value}} has been changed.
listingTerminateIp_success: Your request to terminate the {{service}} service has been successfully processed. You will receive an email to validate it.
listingTerminateIp_ftc_success: Your request to terminate the {{service}} service has been successfully processed. A confirmation email has been sent to you.
listingManageMitigation_permanent_title: Switching from Network Scrubbing Center to permanent mode
listingManageMitigation_permanent_questi: Are you sure you want to enable permanent Scrubbing Center mode on IP {{t0}}? Please use this option with caution (in most cases, you should keep automatic mode).
listingManageMitigation_permanent_succes: Permanent mitigation will be activated shortly on IP {{t0}}.
listingManageMitigation_permanent_failed: An error occurred while activating permanent mode on IP {{t0}}
listingManageMitigation_auto_title: Switching from Network Scrubbing Center mode to automatic mode
listingManageMitigation_auto_question: This way, you enable the default protection mode on IP {{t0}}.
listingManageMitigation_auto_success: Mitigation will switch to automatic mode shortly on IP {{t0}}.
listingManageMitigation_auto_failed: An error occurred while switching mitigation to automatic mode on IP {{t0}}
listingSettingsImportIpFromSys: Import my IP addresses from Sys to OVHcloud
listingExportIpToCsv: Export my IP addresses to a CSV file
survey_link_tooltip: Do you like this page? Please share your feedback!
